updates.title: UnOfficial Announcement
updates.description:
Unofficial Announcement: Upcoming Frieren AI Version 10.0 📢

Release Date: 12/20/2026

Newly Added Features 🆕
[ Credits to @kaminarich ]

- Dex2OAT
- Network Boost 🚀
- Preload Game Assets 🎮
- Governor Configuration
- Log Management (Enable/Disable)

Changelog 📝
- Fix: Frieren Battery
- Frieren Battery updated to version 2
- Frieren Balance Optimization
- Frieren Power Save
- Fix: Excessive Flashing Duration during Completion

The upcoming Version v10.0 release requires additional submissions regarding configuration changes. 🔄
To enhance your device in future updates, please submit any issues related to Frieren AI so they may be addressed in the Version v10.0 update.
